topStories.title: Iran War tests European unity amid German economic slowdown and fears over Ukraine support
topStories.description: The stand of EU member states in the conflict is divergent as Europe faces economic slowdown and inflation amid rising oil and gas prices; Germany fears opposing U.S.-Israel actions could prompt U.S. to withdraw support from Ukraine, while the war could hurt its already faltering economy more

topStories.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
topStories.description: Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.

topStories.title: What we know about US attack on Iraqi military site
topStories.description: Iraqi authorities say a US air strike on a military site in Anbar killed seven soldiers and wounded 13.

topStories.description: Trump says he is talking to "the right people" in Iran, but Tehran says no such negotiations are being held.

topStories.title: 'We are in agony' - Savannah Guthrie does first interview since mum's disappearance
topStories.description: The US presenter says terrifying thoughts wake her at night as she imagines what happened.

dailyNews.description: The cuts will impact employees in the U.S. and other international markets.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not a dalaal nation like Pakistan’: Jaishankar counters Oppn's ‘silence’ charge on US-Iran mediation
dailyNews.description: S Jaishankar added that there was “nothing new” about Pakistan’s role, the country has been “used” by the US since 1981.

dailyNews.title: What it would take to end the Iran war
dailyNews.description: The termination of the US-Israeli war on Iran would require solid guarantees and a credible guarantor.

dailyNews.title: ‘Hate seeing us WIN…’: Trump accuses ‘Radical Left’ Democrats of undermining ‘great military achievement’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump accused Democrats of 'undermining' US' 'great military achievement in Iran'. Earlier today, Iran rejected a US ceasefire offer and laid out its own list of conditions for ending the conflict

dailyNews.title: War on Iran: What troops is the US moving to the Gulf?
dailyNews.description: Growing US military presence around Iran suggests shift from air campaign to potential ground operations.

dailyNews.title: 'Men need to be perp-walked' after Epstein files release, US Congressman Massie tells BBC
dailyNews.description: The US congressman responded to a BBC Newsnight interview with a group of survivors of the late financier's abuse.

dailyNews.title: Iran calls US proposal to end war ‘maximalist, unreasonable’
dailyNews.description: Diplomatic sources tells Al Jazeera that Iran is dismissing the 15-point plan from the United States as unworkable.

dailyNews.title: Democrats flip Florida state seat that includes Trump's Mar-a-Lago home
dailyNews.description: Emily Gregory’s projected victory comes in a legislative district which a Republican candidate won by 19 percentage points in 2024.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Iran rejects US' ceasefire proposal, lays out five conditions to end war, says report
dailyNews.description: Iran on Wednesday (local time) rejected the proposal from the US that was aimed at halting the war in the Middle East, insisting that a ceasefire will only take place on the Islamic Republic's terms and timeline. The country has also listed out five conditions to end the war

dailyNews.title: University of Oregon to offer abortion pills on campus this fall after student pressure campaign
dailyNews.description: The University of Oregon will offer mifepristone and misoprostol to students this fall after a campaign by groups including UO Students for Choice.

dailyNews.title: JD Vance's anti-fraud task force 'ramps up' identifying fraud across US after suspending 70 providers in LA
dailyNews.description: VP JD Vance's anti-fraud task force is expanding nationally, using AI to detect Medicaid fraud after suspending 70 LA providers flagged as high risk.

dailyNews.title: U.S. and Iran Are Talking About Ways to End the War: What to Know
dailyNews.description: The United States is discussing ways to end hostilities with Iran, even as President Trump continues to threaten attacks and as the Pentagon dispatches more troops.

dailyNews.title: Matt Brittin, Former Google Executive, Named the New BBC Head
dailyNews.description: Matt Brittin, the former president of Google in Europe, will become the new director general. Among the items on his to-do list: handling a lawsuit from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will "unleash hell" if Iran does not make deal
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said talks between Washington and Tehran were ongoing, hours after Iran's state media said the regime rejected proosals by the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump waives summer gasoline regulations to ease fuel prices
dailyNews.description: Summer gasoline regulations will be waived for 20 days, and possibly longer to try to ease gas prices.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump pitches robots as potential educators for schoolchildren
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump argued that humanoids can help children develop critical thinking skills — and robots never get impatient.

dailyNews.title: Additional Troops Deployed to Middle East as Trump Claims Victory
dailyNews.description: More than 1,000 additional troops from the 82nd Airborne Division are heading to the Middle East, according to two sources. The announcement came as President Donald Trump in the Oval Office Tuesday said, “We’ve won this, this war has been won.” NBC's Richard Engel reports for TODAY on the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Why Trump may be eyeing Iran's Kharg Island — and why that's a risk
dailyNews.description: The U.S. could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island, an offshore terminal which 90% of its crude oil exports pass.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Republicans launch new party-line bill for ICE, Iran war funding and election laws
dailyNews.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham, with Trump's backing, will craft another Republican reconciliation bill for ICE, military spending on the Iran war and the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Iran rejects U.S. ceasefire offer, demands sovereignty over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

dailyNews.title: White House says Trump will meet Xi in China in May
dailyNews.description: A long-awaited meeting between President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping will take place in Beijing on May 14 and 15, the White House said.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he could send National Guard to airports 'for more help'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says he is considering sending the National Guard to airports where  TSA officer absences have led to long lines.
